head: fac33105a9aefc824dd9f48a6881bcd05e6125db
notes: Initial security agent run. Scans: history+tree credential, gitignore vs tracked, npm audit root+functions, firestore.rules permissiveness, storage.rules existence, AMD-018 exception trail. 2 HIGH deps in functions/ (transitive, narrow exploit path). storage.rules absent — informational.

head: d91cb307fa89eb4539442c6a8ab2d5c8898e9690
notes: Commit d91cb30 included 2 main-flows PNGs (iter-17-{pre,after}-viewport.png) not in my git add staging. Two other agents committed concurrently (67469673 P4 M4, 3e6b6195 cron regen). Most likely cause: pre-commit hook or another agent process auto-staged untracked working-tree changes. Action: investigate auto-staging mechanism in next cycle; mitigate via explicit `git add <files>` + `git stash --include-untracked` before commit; consider proposing AMD that pre-commit not auto-stage cross-agent artifacts.
